THE ULTIMATE FACEBOOK SUPPORT GUIDE

This document is compiled from public Facebook resources and presented for reference, not a study guide or course of any kind. NOT TO BE SOLD, RESOLD, REPACKAGED FOR SALE in any format or circumstance!!! 



This document covers key support and informational areas with Facebook and Instagram.



It’ll be updated periodically when Facebook reps release additional material.



Use it when in need 🙂



Depesh Mandalia - that’s me in the pic below :-)



Last updated: JULY 2018

First, read this: Why Creativity Matters More in the Age of MobileCreative Hub  a new destination where marketers can be inspired by great work, design their own and share it with others.

Creative workshop has a great overview of how to get started with creative

Inspiration Gallery, Creative Tips, Story Packs

Top 10 Creative Apps





== IMPROVE YOUR CREATIVE ==

Creative is a crucial element in the success of your campaign. If your relevance score is low - it means your target audience is responding negatively to your ad and therefore sets you at a lower rank in the auction.

TIP #1: To help the system optimize, try to have at least 2-3 different creatives per ad set. 

TIP #2: TRY THESE APPS to make your creative more engaging!

Instagram Story Ads Best Practices

== ADS IN INSTAGRAM STORIES ==

In March, we launched Ads in Instagram Stories, our first full screen immersive and ephemeral format for all of our global advertisers. Since then, we’ve compiled a few early observations on how brands are leveraging the special experience to connect to their audiences.

-

Check out the best tips from our CREATIVE SHOP and read more about how you can create Ads for Instagram Stories here:

How do I create ads that run on Instagram Stories? [Help Center]:https://www.facebook.com/business/help/1639197963055851

Ads in Instagram Stories [For Developers]:

https://developers.facebook.com/…/blog/post/2017/03/01/ig-…/
